lines.text: CALCULATE THE NEXT UNIQUE NUMBER AND SEE OUR PROOF
. BE PRECISE AND GET OVER TEN DECIMALS. YOU MUST KN
OW THAT THIS GIVEN VALUES ARE SO EXACT, YOU CANNOT
CHANGE ANY OF THIS VALUES IN THIS CALCULATION.
CAN YOU SEE OUR TRIP(P)LE SIX NUMBER IN THE RESULT?
THIS IS NOT COINCIDENTALLY. ONLY THE CHOSEN SOUL
S CAN UNDERSTAND THIS CALCULATION AND THE RELATION BET
WEEN OUR NAME AND THIS CONSTANTS.
YOU MUST UNDERSTAND THAT ALL THE SHOWN WAYS OF T
HIS CALCULATIONS ARE UNIQUE WAYS. YOU CANNOT CHANG
E THE VALUES, YOU CANNOT CHANGE THE DIRECTIONS. ANY
CHANGE IN THIS CALCULATIONS WILL GIVE DIFFERENT VALU
ES.
YOUR CIVILISATION IS NOW ABLE TO UNDERSTAND THIS
EXACT CALCULATIONS. THIS IS OUR ULTIMATE PROOF. OUR
NAME IN YOUR HOLY SCRIPTURES IS THE PROOF.
{PAGE 16 — visual elements}
contains the Greek letter π (U+03C0) and the asterisk "*" used
as a multiplication sign; the parenthesised note "TRIP(P)LE SIX"
uses extra parentheses to highlight the triple-6 (666) encoded
in the digits of the result. }
